During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], two [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transports]] from flight group '''''Thunder''''' attacked [[XQ1 Platform|Station]] ''[[NL-1]]'' during the [[Battle on the Frontier]]. Transports ''Thunder'' entered the battle as part of the first wave in the final confrontation of the Rebel, [[Pakuuni/Legends|Pakuuni]] conspirators and then [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] Task force consisting of [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Ludwick]]'', Platform ''NL-1'', 2 [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|System Patrol Craft]], and various starfighters. After intense dogfighting Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] along with ''NL-1'' destroyed Transports ''Thunder'' and their Rebel comrades.
